case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.- et al VS QUINN, ANTHONY H.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $364.00 FILED BY STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.- -EMPLOYMENT TAX DISTRICT OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINN, ANTHONY H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-1989 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT QUINN, ANTHONY H.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.- -EMPLOYMENT TAX DISTRICT OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINN, ANTHONY H. $364.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $404.00, NOT A RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT. ORIGINAL JUDGMENT ENTERED ON FEB. 10, 89. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $280.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $183.06 ACCRUED INTEREST, $11.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT QUINN, ANTHONY H.
